case_title: CAPITAL INSURANCE GROUP VS. DONALD J DOMINGUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL INSURANCE GROUP
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-04-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL INSURANCE GROUP SERVED SEP-04-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, DONALD J
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-29-2003. DEC-05-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL INSURANCE GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, DONALD J THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL INSURANCE GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONALD DOMINGUEZ THE SUM OF $2,159.09. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-11-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. MAY-04-2004 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR JAMES ATTRIDGE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-29-2003 THROUGH MAR-28-2004.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR JAMES ATTRIDGE
